description: Style Note  A backpack easily distributes the weight across your shoulders and back, making loads easy to carry while keeping you looking cool and confident. Fill this versatile Nike backpack with your laptop and office essentials, sportswear when you're heading to the field or gym, or use it on a trek in the great outdoors, and enjoy the ample storing space for all your gear.Product Details Nike Ultimatum Max Air Gear Light weight Backpack with the Nike Swoosh in front and back Has two air padded adjustable shoulder straps which are connected by a click clock fastening for better support, a padded back and a small carry on handle One zippered main compartment with an elasticated laptop pouch big enough for a 17" laptop One zippered compartment in front of that with organiser sleeves which have padded Velcro closures An insulated zippered water bottle carrier on the right and a zippered compartment on the left with an open pocket inside A compartment in front with a hook fastening Two mesh pockets on the sides One zippered compartment at the base for wet items that extends upwards into the main compartment  Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)Material and CareExterior: 100% polyester Lining: 93% nylon and 7% EVA Clean with a damp cloth when neededSize Height: 49 cm Width: 31 cm Depth: 22 cm
